selectedSlice: Add a Review Queue-specific school-pick state when /api/site/review-queue returns site_selection_required.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real protected-workspace gap: the Review Queue route already returned selectionRequired plus accessibleSites, and the workspace already had exact school-pick states for Site Dashboard, Students, Programs, Mentor Assignments, Operations, and Users & Access. The missing work was limited to workspace.js, where renderTeacherSection() still fell through to a generic unavailable branch.
candidateShortlist: Broader Global Admin route refresh across Recent Audit, Students, Presentation, Programs, and Users & Access
userFacingImprovement: Multi-site review-capable staff now see a Review Queue-specific school-pick state with accessible-site buttons and next-step guidance instead of a generic unavailable card when they have not chosen a school yet.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses the existing /api/site/review-queue selectionRequired contract and current site-switch buttons instead of adding a route or changing queue filters.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed.
Review Queue data stays hidden until the user explicitly chooses an accessible school.

validation.notes: Focused workspace syntax and workspace coverage passed before docs/state closeout. The full validation ladder also passed after the closeout files were updated.

deferred: Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than this bounded multi-site Review Queue handoff slice.
Admin mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise scoped destination.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
Student hosted drill-down refresh still needs a broader hosted/product pass.
Administration hosted read-only click-through refresh still needs hosted runtime.
nextRecommended: Resume the bounded Global Admin route refresh only where the current workspace can prove an exact destination, and keep mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only until a precise backed path exists.
doNotRepeat: Do not fall back to a generic unavailable card when /api/site/review-queue returns site_selection_required.
Do not silently auto-pick a school for multi-site review flows without an explicit site-selection contract and proof.
Do not invent a new Review Queue route or unscoped review fetch for this handoff.
